channel.title: DiskANN on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in DiskANN on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Advanced filtering for DiskANN vector search in Azure HorizonDB
item.description:
Advanced filtering for DiskANN vector search in Azure HorizonDB is now in public preview. It lets you combine vector similarity search with metadata filters such as category, date range, price, or tenant ID.

  • Source: Azure Updates
